bool freeze update: prey_freeze or man_freeze <- false
set energy value: energy + (energy_resting_capacity / (1 + length(neighbors_at(self,body_radius * population_density_radius))))
bool in_mountains <- false update: mountain_b and covers(mountain[0],location)
float sensor_distance_range min: body_radius * 2 max: float(world.environment_size)
bool wander (2 speed, 2 amplitude, 13 bounds, 15 on, 10 proba_edges)
path goto (13 target, 2 speed, 0 on, 3 recompute_path, 3 return_path, 10 move_weights)
path follow (2 speed, 17 path, 10 move_weights, 3 return_path)
let angle_step type: float value: 2 * asin(sensor_precision / (2 * sensor_distance_range))
let n_rays type: int value: int(ceil(sensor_angle_range / angle_step))
let new_angle_step type: float value: sensor_angle_range / n_rays
let angle_step_t type: float value: sensor_angle_range / (nn_n_sensor_groups - 1)
let agents_in_sensor_radius type: list<animal> value: prey at_distance (sensor_distance_range - default_body_radius)
set agents_in_sensor_radius value: agents_in_sensor_radius + (predator at_distance (sensor_distance_range + default_body_radius))
let sensed_dist type: float value: in_mountains ? (sensor_distance_range * mountain_visibility_reduction) : sensor_distance_range
let r_start type: point value: point(point(location.x + (body_radius * cos(heading + ray_agl)),location.y + (body_radius * sin(heading + ray_agl))))
let r_end type: point value: point(point(location.x + (sensed_dist * cos(heading + ray_agl)),location.y + (sensed_dist * sin(heading + ray_agl))))
let r type: geometry value: inter(line([r_start,r_end]),world.shape)
let a_s type: list<animal> value: agents_in_sensor_radius overlapping r
set v value: v + ((energy_max - energy) / energy_max)
let idx_start type: int value: int(round((idx_ray_group * length(sensor_angles)) / nn_n_sensor_groups))
let idx_end type: int value: int(round(((idx_ray_group + 1) * length(sensor_angles)) / nn_n_sensor_groups))
let a_distance type: float value: sensor_distance_range
let a_idx type: int value: idx_start
let sensed type: bool value: false
loop idx from: idx_start to: idx_end - 1
let a_sensed type: animal value: sensed_agents[a_idx]
let a_angle type: float value: sensor_angles[a_idx]
let f_hidden type: matrix<float> value: matrix<float>(nn_f_in) . transpose(nn_w_in) + nn_b_in
set nn_memory_hidden value: (nn_memory_hidden = nil) ? f_hidden : ((memory_discount_factor * nn_memory_hidden) + ((1 - memory_discount_factor) * f_hidden))
let attack_damage type: float value: max([0.0,attack_to_inflict - a.ad_defense])
let a_new_health type: float value: a.health - attack_damage
set w_std value: (std_discount * evolution_w_std) * (self.get_normal_std(m_out:length(rows_list(nn_w_in)), hidden_layer:true, n_in:length(columns_list(nn_w_in)), bias:false))
set w_std value: (std_discount * evolution_w_std) * (self.get_normal_std(m_out:length(rows_list(nn_b_in)), hidden_layer:true, n_in:length(columns_list(nn_b_in)), bias:true))
set w_std value: (std_discount * evolution_w_std) * (self.get_normal_std(m_out:length(rows_list(nn_w_hidden)), hidden_layer:false, n_in:length(columns_list(nn_w_hidden)), bias:false))

float get_normal_std (int n_in, int m_out, bool hidden_layer, bool bias)
return hidden_layer ? sqrt(2 / n_in) : sqrt(2 / (n_in + m_out))
let noise_std type: float value: evolution_decay ^ gen_count
set body_radius value: parent.body_radius * (self.growth_value(growth:br_evolution_b, std:evolution_std * noise_std))
set ad_ratio value: parent.ad_ratio * (self.growth_value(growth:ad_evolution_b, std:evolution_std * noise_std))
set sensor_distance_range value: parent.sensor_distance_range * (self.growth_value(growth:sensor_evolution_b, std:evolution_std * noise_std))
set sensor_angle_range value: parent.sensor_angle_range * (self.growth_value(growth:sensor_evolution_b, std:evolution_std * noise_std))
set nn_n_hidden_neurons value: int(round(parent.nn_n_hidden_neurons * max([self.growth_value(growth:hn_init_b, std:evolution_std * noise_std),1.0])))
let new_hidden_neuron type: int value: nn_n_hidden_neurons - parent.nn_n_hidden_neurons
let w_std type: float value: init_std
set w_std value: self.get_normal_std(m_out:nn_n_hidden_neurons, hidden_layer:true, n_in:length(columns_list(nn_w_in)), bias:false)
let new_ws_in_w type: matrix<float> value: world.get_gauss_matrix(std:w_std, m:new_hidden_neuron, n:length(columns_list(nn_w_in)))
set w_std value: self.get_normal_std(m_out:1, hidden_layer:true, n_in:nn_n_hidden_neurons, bias:true)
let new_b_in_w type: matrix<float> value: world.get_gauss_matrix(std:w_std, m:1, n:new_hidden_neuron)
set w_std value: self.get_normal_std(m_out:n_output_features, hidden_layer:false, n_in:nn_n_hidden_neurons, bias:false)

experiment 'Simulation_Testing' type: 'gui' title: 'Experiment Simulation_Testing' benchmark: true
parameter 'Environment Size' <- 100 min: 50 max: 1000 var: environment_size step: 50 category: 'Environment'
parameter 'Population per Square of 10' <- 0.5 min: 0.1 max: 2.5 var: pop_per_10_square step: 0.1 category: 'Environment'
parameter 'Proportion of Predators' <- 1 / 3 min: 0.1 max: 0.9 var: init_predator_prey_ratio step: 0.05 category: 'Environment' colors: [#red,#purple,#blue]
parameter 'Add Mountain' <- true category: 'Environment' var: mountain_b colors: [#green,#grey]
parameter 'Mountain Shape' <- 'circle' category: 'Environment' var: mountain_range_shape among: ['circle','square','line']
parameter 'Log Cycle Durations' <- false category: 'Logging' var: record_duration colors: [#green,#grey]
parameter 'Log Agents' <- true category: 'Logging' var: log_agents colors: [#green,#grey]
parameter 'Health and Energy Bar' <- false category: 'Visualisation' var: visualize_health_energy colors: [#green,#grey]
parameter 'Rays' <- false category: 'Visualisation' var: visualize_rays colors: [#green,#grey]
parameter 'Simulation Metrics Refresh' <- 10 min: 5 max: 100 var: simulation_charts_refresh_count step: 5 category: 'Visualisation'
parameter 'Behavior Metrics Refresh' <- 25 min: 5 max: 100 var: behavior_charts_refresh_count step: 5 category: 'Visualisation'
parameter 'Evolution Metrics Refresh' <- 25 min: 5 max: 100 var: evolution_charts_refresh_count step: 5 category: 'Visualisation'
parameter 'Performance Metrics Refresh' <- 50 min: 5 max: 100 var: performance_charts_refresh_count step: 5 category: 'Visualisation'
parameter 'Sensor Distance Range' <- 15.0 min: 10.0 max: 50.0 var: default_sensor_distance_ratio step: 1.0 category: 'Agent Sensors'
parameter 'Sensor Angle Range' <- 180.0 min: 60.0 max: 360.0 var: default_sensor_angle_range step: 10.0 category: 'Agent Sensors'
parameter 'Sensor Angle Precision' <- 2.0 min: 0.5 max: 4.0 var: sensor_precision_ratio step: 0.25 category: 'Agent Sensors'
parameter 'Movement Energy Ratio' <- 0.015 min: 0.005 max: 0.05 var: energy_consumption_moving_w step: 0.005 category: 'Agent Energy'
parameter 'Thinking to Moving Ratio' <- 1 / 2 min: 1 / 10 max: 1 / 1 var: moving_to_thinking_ratio step: 1 / 10 category: 'Agent Energy'
parameter 'Neurons Weight in Energy' <- 1.0 min: 1.0 max: 5.0 var: hn_w step: 0.5 category: 'Agent Energy'
parameter 'Rays Weight in Energy' <- 1.0 min: 1.0 max: 5.0 var: nr_w step: 0.5 category: 'Agent Energy'
parameter 'Population Density Radius' <- 5.0 min: 1.0 max: 10.0 var: population_density_radius step: 0.5 category: 'Agent Energy'
parameter 'Number of Sensor Groups' <- 3 min: 2 max: 9 var: default_sensor_groups step: 1 category: 'Agent Brain'
parameter 'Weight Distribution' <- true category: 'Agent Brain' var: use_he_normal_weights labels: ['He & Glorot Normal','Standard Normal']
parameter 'Clip NN Weights' <- true category: 'Agent Brain' var: clip_weights colors: [#green,#grey]
parameter 'Starting Hidden Neurons' <- 0 min: 0 max: 12 var: default_n_hidden_neurons step: 1 category: 'Agent Brain'
parameter 'Use Detected Heading/Speed' <- false category: 'Agent Brain' var: use_detected_info colors: [#green,#grey]
parameter 'Use NN Memory' <- false category: 'Agent Brain' var: use_memory colors: [#green,#grey]
parameter 'Init Distribution Std' <- 0.5 min: 0.1 max: 0.9 var: init_std step: 0.1 category: 'Agent Evolution'
parameter 'Init Distribute Body Radius' <- false category: 'Agent Evolution' var: br_init_b colors: [#green,#grey]
parameter 'Init Distribute Attack/Def' <- false category: 'Agent Evolution' var: ad_init_b colors: [#green,#grey]
parameter 'Init Distribute Sensors' <- false category: 'Agent Evolution' var: sensor_init_b colors: [#green,#grey]
parameter 'Init Distribute Hidden Neur.' <- false category: 'Agent Evolution' var: hn_init_b colors: [#green,#grey]
parameter 'Evolution Decay' <- 0.99 min: 0.5 max: 1.0 var: evolution_decay step: 0.01 category: 'Agent Evolution'
parameter 'Evolution Std' <- 0.1 min: 0.1 max: 0.9 var: evolution_std step: 0.1 category: 'Agent Evolution'
parameter 'Evolve Body Radius' <- false category: 'Agent Evolution' var: br_evolution_b colors: [#green,#grey]
parameter 'Evolve Attack/Defense' <- false category: 'Agent Evolution' var: ad_evolution_b colors: [#green,#grey]
parameter 'Evolve Sensors' <- false category: 'Agent Evolution' var: sensor_evolution_b colors: [#green,#grey]
parameter 'Evolve Hidden Neurons' <- false category: 'Agent Evolution' var: hn_evolution_b colors: [#green,#grey]
parameter 'Evolve NN Weights' <- true category: 'Agent Evolution' var: w_evolution_b colors: [#green,#grey]
parameter 'Attack-Defense Discount' <- 1.0 min: 0.2 max: 1.0 var: ad_health_ratio step: 0.05 category: 'Species Behavior'
parameter 'Attack Rollover' <- false category: 'Species Behavior' var: attack_rollover colors: [#green,#grey]
parameter 'Attack Forward Only' <- true category: 'Species Behavior' var: attack_infront colors: [#green,#grey]
parameter 'Suffocation' <- true category: 'Species Behavior' var: suffocation_b colors: [#green,#grey]

parameter 'Predator: Repro. Amount' <- 1.5 min: 1.0 max: 5.0 var: reproduction_w_predator step: 0.5 category: 'Species Specific'
parameter 'Predator: Attack/Def. Ratio' <- 1.0 min: 0.5 max: 1.0 var: predator_ad_ratio step: 1 / 20 category: 'Species Specific'
